assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response correctly states Regular channel clusters will automatically upgrade to the next available version (likely 1.31+) 2-4 weeks after EoS date

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly states 12 months of extended support instead of 24 months, and doesn't emphasize that EoS is significantly later for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response states No channel clusters will remain on 1.30 indefinitely, which is incorrect - it doesn't mention the auto-upgrade behavior for EoS versions

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: No mention of maintenance exclusions or temporary deferral mechanisms for EoS upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response recommends scheduling upgrades during preferred maintenance windows and planning migration strategies before auto-upgrades kick in

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: No mention of Cloud Logging notifications or GKE EoS notification mechanisms

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: No mention of deprecation insights dashboard or API compatibility checking tools

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response warns about security risks for No channel clusters and recommends switching to Regular channel for automatic updates, addressing the snowflaking concern
